questions.question: Paul uses the story of Abraham's two sons to illustrate what?
options: The old covenant of law versus the new covenant of promise
questions.answer: The old covenant of law versus the new covenant of promise

questions.question: Because believers are sons, God sent what into their hearts?
Paul is concerned the Galatians are turning back to weak and worthless elementary principles.
God sent forth his Son, born of a woman, born under the law, to _____ those who were under the law.
The Spirit cries in our hearts, '_____, Father!'
